nl_query: Show all scripts where the primary evaluator has frozen the attempt, a review evaluator has been assigned, but the review attempt has not yet started, including the primary evaluator name, review evaluator name, and board code.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.id, a.urn, ea1.evaluator_user_id AS primary_evaluator_id, ea2.evaluator_user_id AS review_evaluator_id, b.code AS board_code, au1.display_name AS primary_evaluator_name, au2.display_name AS review_evaluator_name
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   script_assignment sa1 ON sa1.script_id = a.id AND sa1.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' AND sa1.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea1 ON ea1.assignment_id = sa1.id AND ea1.status = 'FROZEN' AND ea1.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   script_assignment sa2 ON sa2.script_id = a.id AND sa2.attempt_type = 'REVIEW' AND sa2.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea2 ON ea2.assignment_id = sa2.id AND ea2.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND ea2.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   board b ON b.id = a.course_id
JOIN   app_user au1 ON au1.id = ea1.evaluator_user_id
JOIN   app_user au2 ON au2.id = ea2.evaluator_user_id
WHERE  a.evaluation_status = 'ATTEMPTED'
  AND  a.scan_status = 'SCANNED'
  AND  a.block_status IN ('NONE', 'MALPRACTICE')
  AND  ea1.status = 'FROZEN'
  AND  ea2.status = 'ASSIGNED'
  AND  ea2.started_at IS NULL
ORDER  BY a.urn ASC
LIMIT  500;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board.code. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
